# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client/build
# It was generated by CMake: /home/daniel/ncs/toolchains/911f4c5c26/usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Application Binary Directory
APPLICATION_BINARY_DIR:PATH=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client/build

//Application Source Directory
APPLICATION_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/zephyr/share/sysbuild/template

//Main Application Source Directory
APP_DIR:PATH=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client

//Selected board
BOARD:STRING=nrf54l15dk/nrf54l15/cpuapp

//Main board directory for board (nrf54l15dk)
BOARD_DIR:PATH=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/zephyr/boards/nordic/nrf54l15dk

//Selected board
CACHED_BOARD:STRING=nrf54l15dk/nrf54l15/cpuapp

//Selected shield
CACHED_SHIELD:STRING=

//Selected snippet
CACHED_SNIPPET:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of build database during the build.
CMAKE_EXPORT_BUILD_DATABASE:BOOL=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client/build/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Program used to build from build.ninja files.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/home/daniel/ncs/toolchains/911f4c5c26/usr/local/bin/ninja

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_COMPAT_VERSION:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=sysbuild_toplevel

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_SPDX_LICENSE:STATIC=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CONFIG_DEBUG_OPTIMIZATIONS:UNINITIALIZED=y

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CONFIG_DEBUG_THREAD_INFO:UNINITIALIZED=y

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CONF_FILE:UNINITIALIZED=prj.conf

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
DEBUG_THREAD_INFO:UNINITIALIZED=On

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
WEST_PYTHON:UNINITIALIZED=/home/daniel/ncs/toolchains/911f4c5c26/usr/local/bin/python3.12

//Zephyr base
ZEPHYR_BASE:PATH=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/zephyr

//Path to merged image in Intel Hex format
ZEPHYR_RUNNER_CONFIG_KERNEL_HEX:STRING=

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Zephyr.
Zephyr_DIR:PATH=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/zephyr/share/zephyr-package/cmake

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
coap_client_DEBUG_THREAD_INFO:UNINITIALIZED=On

//Value Computed by CMake
sysbuild_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client/build/_sysbuild

//Value Computed by CMake
sysbuild_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
sysbuild_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/zephyr/share/sysbuild/template

//Value Computed by CMake
sysbuild_toplevel_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client/build

//Value Computed by CMake
sysbuild_toplevel_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
sysbuild_toplevel_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/zephyr/share/sysbuild
